TO RE-SCHEDULE THE HEARING, PLEASE REFER TO THE PUBLIC NOTICE TO RESTORE SERVICES ISSUED ON MAY 27, 2020 AVAILABLE ON THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT HTTPS://SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG/. (302/EPS)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-04-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KANIKA D. CORLEY, Esq. of Akerman LLP (Tel: 213-688-9500) for Plaintiff /Cross-Defendant VII Peaks Co-Optivist Income BDC II, Inc. and Cross-Defendants VII Peaks Capital, LLC, Alesiatec, Inc. and Gurpreet Chandhoke;
No other appearances in this matter.

Hearing Re: Plaintiff/Cross-Defendants' Motion For Attorneys' Fees.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff and Cross-Defendants' motion for an award of attorneys' fees from Defendant and Cross-Complainant Geocommerce Inc. is granted in the amount of $474,518.32. The motion was timely served and filed, no opposition was filed by Defendant, and moving parties show good cause for the award.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Jun-26-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Attys. KANIKA D. CORLEY, Esq. and ELIZABETH S. HORN, Esq. of Akerman, LLP (Tel: 213-688-9500) appearing via CourtCall for the moving cross-defendants;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: CROSS-DEFENDANTS VII PEAKS C0-0PTIVIST INCOME BDC II, INC., VII PEAKS CAPITAL, LLC, ALESIATEC, INC., GUPREET CHANDHOKE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues.

Matter not contested or argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling:

Plaintiff VII Peaks Co-Optivist Income BDC, Inc.'s (VII Peaks) unopposed motion for summary judgment of its complaint against GeoCommerce, Inc. (GeoCommerce) is granted. Cross-defendants VII Peaks, VII Peaks Capital, LLC, AlesiaTec, Inc. and Gurpreet Chandhoke's unopposed motion for summary judgment on GeoCommerce's cross-complaint is also granted.

In 2016, GeoCommerce borrowed some $4 million under four loans from VII Peaks, but did not pay on the mature loans in 2018. (SSUF 2-6, 8, 10, 12, 29.) GeoCommerce's cross-complaint alleges that cross-defendants breached "numerous agreements," but GeoCommerce has adduced no evidence of any breach. (SSUF 43, 59, 60, 61.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
